name: Two Pointers
description: Left and right pointers converging on a sorted array to find pairs or triplets.

name: Sliding Window
description: Expand/shrink a window over a sequence to satisfy a constraint.

name: Fast & Slow Pointers
description: Tortoise-and-hare to detect cycles or find midpoints in linked lists.

name: Merge Intervals
description: Sort then sweep intervals, merging overlapping ranges.

name: Cyclic Sort
description: Place each number at its correct index in O(n) for 1..n arrays.

name: In-place Reversal
description: Reverse a linked list (or sub-list) using pointer manipulation, no extra space.

name: BFS
description: Level-order traversal using a queue; shortest path in unweighted graphs.

name: DFS
description: Depth-first traversal using recursion or an explicit stack.

name: Two Heaps
description: Max-heap + min-heap to maintain the running median or split a stream.

name: Subsets / Backtracking
description: Generate all subsets, permutations, or combinations by exploring a decision tree.

name: Modified Binary Search
description: Binary search on rotated arrays, ranges, or answer spaces.

name: Top K Elements
description: Heap of size k to find the k largest/smallest/most-frequent elements.

name: K-way Merge
description: Min-heap to merge k sorted lists or arrays efficiently.

name: Topological Sort
description: Kahn's algorithm (BFS + in-degree) or DFS post-order to order a DAG.

name: 0/1 Knapsack DP
description: Classic include/exclude DP; generalises to subset-sum, partition, and coin-change.

name: Prefix Sum
description: Precompute cumulative sums for O(1) range queries.

name: Monotonic Stack
description: Stack kept in sorted order to find next greater/smaller element in O(n).

name: Balanced Brackets
description: Push openers onto a stack and pop to match each closer; the LIFO order enforces correct nesting.

name: Sorting
description: Applying a sort to simplify a problem (e.g. 4Sum, meeting rooms).

name: Hash Map / Counting
description: Frequency counting and complement lookup to reduce O(n²) to O(n).

name: Kadane's Algorithm
description: Maximum subarray sum in O(n) using local vs global max tracking.

name: Dutch National Flag
description: Three-way partition (0s/1s/2s) using low/mid/high pointers.

name: Expand Around Centre
description: Check palindromic substrings by expanding outward from each centre.

name: Floyd's Cycle Detection
description: Fast/slow pointers to detect and find the start of a cycle.

name: Dijkstra / Shortest Path
description: Priority-queue BFS for weighted shortest paths.

name: Greedy
description: Locally optimal choices that yield a globally optimal solution.
